scripts.start: npm ci && composer install && npm run build
scripts.dev: rm -rf build && npm run sync-theme && wp-scripts start --webpack-src-dir=src
scripts.build: rm -rf build && npm run sync-theme && wp-scripts build --webpack-src-dir=src
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:php
scripts.format: npm run format:js && npm run format:php
